title: Autonomous Research Program Continuity: Batches 5-8
actualExecutionPerformed: This program review synthesizes already executed Batch 5-8 public results, including Batch 8's six new target executions and the reuse of three Batch 7 custom tools.
continuityEvidence: Batch 8 reused Batch 7 tools, attacked Batch 7 tool claims, updated confidence values, and selected the next research direction from observed tool successes and failures.
learningAcrossResults: Execution-first results exposed the need for stricter reproduction; reproduction and dataset issues motivated custom tools; custom tools were then tested across new targets; failures narrowed tool scope; the surviving evidence promoted dataset and metric validation as the next deep direction.
nextResearchDirection: Promote dataset and metric validation as the next deep toolchain direction, while keeping repository test summarization as a narrow support instrument until dependency handling is tested further.
humanReadableSummary: Sovryn demonstrated cross-result learning across Batches 5-8 by moving from execution-backed results to reproduction ladders, custom tools, tool reuse/failure benchmarking, confidence updates, and evidence-based next-direction selection.
disclaimer: Sovryn produces autonomous open-research artifacts, defensive publications, and open-source research evidence. It is not a patent filing system and does not provide legal patentability, legal novelty, or freedom-to-operate opinions.
